results.title: Resources - Harris County Flood Control District
results.snippet: Our maintenance team works year-round to keep our expansive flood control infrastructure operating as designed and ready for the next storm. This work is critical to our mission to plan, implement, and maintain the systems that reduce flood risk in Harris County.

results.title: Storm Drainage Design Criteria Manual - Bulverde, TX
results.snippet: For lots in a platted subdivision served by a stormwater drainage system designed and constructed in accordance with this manual: total impervious cover less than or equal to the total impervious cover calculated for each lot by the Stormwater Management Plan approved for that subdivision.

results.title: PDF Stormwater Design Manual (PDF) - CivicPlus
results.snippet: Easements are required for all public drainage systems that convey stormwater runoff across a development and shall be required for both on-site and off-site public stormwater drainage improvements, including standard engineering channels, storm drain systems, detention and retention facilities, and

results.title: PDF CITY OF McALLEN
results.snippet: This document has been prepared to standardize design requirements for streets, storm drainage, water and sanitary sewer facilities that are primarily constructed as part of residential and commercial subdivisions.

results.title: Dallas Standard Construction Details 251D | PDF | Road Surface ... - Scribd
results.snippet: Dallas Standard Construction Details 251D This document contains the City of Dallas, Texas Department of Public Works Standard Construction Details, which provides recommended construction details for paving, storm drainage, structures, alleys, traffic control, and miscellaneous items.

results.title: City of Houston Design Manual Chapter 9 STORMWATER DESIGN AND WATER ...
results.snippet: Drainage criteria administered by the City of Houston and complemented by Harris County and the Harris County Flood Control District (HCFCD) for newly designed areas provides protection from Structural Flooding from a 100-year storm event. results.title: PDF City of El Paso Stormwater Design Manual
results.snippet: Design of all storm drainage pipes shall show plan and profile views, as well as all structures used to convey water (longer than 10 feet), which includes but is not limited to; swales, trench drains, alleys, roadways, flow channels, etc...

results.title: PDF DRAINAGE DESIGN STANDARDS - addisontx.gov
results.snippet: Design flow of storm water runoff is to be calculated using the Rational Method for storm drainage systems serving a watershed area less than one hundred (100) acres.

results.title: PDF DRAINAGE DESIGN MANUAL - City of Dallas
results.snippet: Applicable forms, tables, charts, nomograph, details and additional information which can be used for the design of various storm drainage facilities are contained in the appendix to this manual. results.title: PDF TxDOT Houston District - Texas Department of Transportation
results.snippet: This document presents the Drainage Criteria, Procedures, and Design Guidelines for typical site developments that share frontage with Texas Department of Transportation (TxDOT) and have proposed discharge to TxDOT right-of-way (ROW).
